atomic_facts.fact: The man is wearing a blue apron over a red, white, and blue plaid shirt.
A baking sheet in the foreground contains what appears to be roasted kale or a similar leafy green vegetable.
The man's right hand is raised slightly with fingers curled, as if gesturing while speaking.
A logo for 'THE JACQUES PÉPIN FOUNDATION' is visible in the bottom-left corner.
The kitchen has wooden cabinetry and a window to the left of the man.

spatial: The man is the central figure, positioned behind a kitchen counter. In front of him are a baking sheet with food and a large cutting board. The background consists of a well-equipped kitchen with cabinets, appliances, and a window.

atomic_facts.fact: The green leafy vegetables are spread in a single layer on the wire rack.
The wire rack is placed inside a rimmed baking sheet.
The vegetables appear to be kale or a similar leafy green.
The lighting is bright and even, suggesting indoor kitchen lighting.

spatial: A baking sheet containing a wire rack covered with green leafy vegetables dominates the center of the frame. A wooden surface is visible in the top left, and a speckled countertop is visible in the top right and bottom right. A small logo is in the bottom left corner.

atomic_facts.fact: Text credits are displayed on a light blue textured background.
The text 'Director of Photography' is followed by 'Tom Hopkins'.
The text 'Post-Production by' is followed by 'Tina Salter' and 'Byron W. Thompson'.
The text 'Executive Producer' is followed by 'Claudine Pépin'.
The text 'Produced and Presented by' is followed by 'The Jacques Pépin Foundation'.
A website URL 'www.jp.foundation' is visible at the bottom right.
